text.autoconfig.combatnumbers-client.opt: Enabled
Render Mode

Changes how combat numbers are rendered. HUD: Renders text on the GUI layer. Recommended option as it's pretty simple and reliable. SCREEN: Renders text directly in front of your camera. Known issue: may be obscured by water. WORLD: Renders text where the entity is standing on. Known issue: may be obscured by entities, particles, water.
Changes how combat numbers are rendered.
HUD: Renders text on the GUI layer. Recommended option as it's pretty simple and reliable.
SCREEN: Renders text directly in front of your camera. Known issue: may be obscured by water.
WORLD: Renders text where the entity is standing on. Known issue: may be obscured by entities, particles, water.
Font Size
How large the text is. This is also affected by your GUI scale setting.
How large the text is. This is also affected by your GUI scale setting.
Near Fade Distance
Text will begin fading out from this distance (in blocks) as you get nearer.
Text will begin fading out from this distance (in blocks) as you get nearer.
Max Render Distance
Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the text is rendered. Note that the server side also has a max render distance, which may be lower than this value.
Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the text is rendered. Note that the server side also has a max render distance, which may be lower than this value.
Distance Falloff Start
Distance (in blocks) at which text will begin to appear smaller in size.
Distance (in blocks) at which text will begin to appear smaller in size.
Distance Falloff End
Distance (in blocks) at which the text reaches its minimum scale.
Distance (in blocks) at which the text reaches its minimum scale.
Distance Minimum Scale
Minimum scale at max distance falloff.
Minimum scale at max distance falloff.
text.autoconfig.combatnumbers-server.opt: Server broadcasts combat events to clients within this range (in blocks).
